description: This email template is perfect for businesses looking to communicate important updates, announcements, and reminders to their employees during the holy month of Ramadan. Falling under the categories of Newsletter, Seasonal, and Seasonal Promotion, it's designed to maintain internal communications while respecting the significance of the season. The template is structured to accommodate monthly newsletters and is versatile enough to be used for routine company updates. It's a great tactic to foster a sense of unity among employees, acknowledging their shared experiences during Ramadan. Its content is thoughtfully curated to harmonize business matters with the spirit of the season, making it a valuable asset for any company during this period.
short_description: Enhance internal communications with our Ramadan newsletter template. Ideal for company announcements, updates, and seasonal promotions. Foster unity and engagement within your team during this holy month. Perfect for monthly newsletters and business boosts.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))

Ramadan Kareem

Ramadan is an Islamic holy month of fasting, prayer, and reflection. During this special time, Muslims from all around the world demonstrate their taqwa (God-consciousness) by dedicating themselves to fasting from dawn to sunset each day and increasing spiritual reflection and Quranic recitation. The end of Ramadan is marked by the joyous Eid al-Fitr celebration, where observers exchange gifts and break their fasts after prayer.
